prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a **custom 3.5-inch titanium-aluminide turbine housing** to optimize spool for the **JLH-3G15TD** 1.5L turbocharged inline-3 engine, targeting 380-400whp on E85 with a **PTP Turbo 4-inch V-band downpipe** and **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** for precise boost control at 28-30psi

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **Bosch Motorsport 0280158802** 1000cc/min high-impedance injectors, **AEM 30-2056** wideband O2 controller, and **CP-Carrillo forged pistons (8.5:1 CR)** with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** to handle increased cylinder pressures, paired with a **DW300C-1000** fuel pump and **Radium Engineering dual-port fuel pressure regulator** for E85 compatibility

**Öhlins TTX40 MkII 2-way adjustable coilovers** with **Cyan Racing-spec rebound and compression valving**, **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs**, and **polyurethane subframe bushings (03-specific)** to eliminate chassis flex, combined with a **Cyan Racing front strut brace (aluminum 7075-T6)** and **rear upper control arm reinforcements (laser-cut 4130 chromoly)** for WTCR-level stiffness
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (03-specific)** with **carbon fiber front fenders (pre-preg autoclave, 2x2 twill weave)**, **rear overfenders (hand-laid with 3K finish)**, and **custom aluminum inner fender liners** to clear the **GTX3582R turbo setup**, paired with a **Cyan Racing rear diffuser (CFRP, 3D-printed mold)** and **Vortex Generator carbon hood (50% weight reduction vs. OEM)**

**APR Performance GTC-300 270mm rear wing (carbon fiber, 3D-printed endplates)** with **adjustable angle of attack (0-20 degrees)** and **integrated Gurney flap (3mm)**, mounted via **Cyan Racing titanium wing studs (Grade 5, anodized blue)** to match the **OMP Carbon Kevlar racing seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified)** and **Sabelt 6-point harnesses (HYBRID F1-style)**

**Enkei PF09RR wheels (18x9.5 +30 front, 18x10.5 +35 rear, 5x114.3 PCD)** in **Cyan Racing matte blue (custom powder-coated)**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)**, paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm front rotors, 355mm rear)** and **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** for endurance-level stopping power
